prompts.name: Cat
prompts.text: Add a realistic domestic cat with soft fur, expressive eyes, natural posture, and believable interaction with the scene.

prompts.name: Fox
prompts.text: Add a graceful fox with a fluffy tail, alert ears, detailed fur, and a quiet intelligent presence.

prompts.name: Wolf
prompts.text: Add a majestic wolf with thick fur, strong posture, and a calm wild presence.

prompts.name: Rabbit
prompts.text: Add a cute rabbit with soft fur, bright eyes, and gentle posture.

prompts.name: Owl
prompts.text: Add an owl with detailed feathers, large expressive eyes, and a wise still presence.

prompts.name: Butterflies
prompts.text: Add delicate butterflies with colorful wings, soft motion, and natural placement in the scene.

prompts.name: Horse
prompts.text: Add a horse with strong anatomy, flowing mane, and realistic posture.

prompts.name: Dragon
prompts.text: Add a fantasy dragon with detailed scales, powerful wings, and majestic presence.

prompts.name: Songbird
prompts.text: Add a small songbird with delicate feathers and natural perched posture.

prompts.name: Dog
prompts.text: Add a friendly dog with expressive eyes, natural fur, and warm companionship.

prompts.name: Deer
prompts.text: Add a graceful deer with elegant antlers, soft fur, and calm forest presence.

prompts.name: Colorful Fish
prompts.text: Add colorful fish with flowing fins, shimmering scales, and natural aquatic movement.

prompts.name: Raven
prompts.text: Add a raven with glossy black feathers, sharp silhouette, and mysterious atmosphere.

prompts.name: Panda
prompts.text: Add a gentle panda with soft black-and-white fur and relaxed posture.

prompts.name: Tiger
prompts.text: Add a powerful tiger with vivid stripes, muscular body, and intense presence.
